applicationGeneralProvider.title: Provider
applicationGeneralProvider.subtitle: Select the source of your code

configureRich.github: To deploy using GitHub, you need to configure your account first. Please, go to <link>Settings</link> to do so.
configureRich.gitlab: To deploy using GitLab, you need to configure your account first. Please, go to <link>Settings</link> to do so.
configureRich.bitbucket: To deploy using Bitbucket, you need to configure your account first. Please, go to <link>Settings</link> to do so.
configureRich.gitea: To deploy using Gitea, you need to configure your account first. Please, go to <link>Settings</link> to do so.

unauthorized.alert: This application is connected to a {sourceType} repository through a git provider that you don't have access to. You can see basic repository information below, but cannot modify the configuration.
unauthorized.disconnectDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to disconnect this repository?
unauthorized.disconnectHint: Disconnecting will allow you to configure a new repository with your own git providers.
